exec zip -r theme.zip style.css
exec wpry theme.zip

cmp stdout out.golden
! stderr .

-- style.css --
/*
Theme Name: Full Theme
Description: A full theme.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: Theme Author
*/

-- out.golden --
{"file":"style.css","theme":{"name":"Full Theme","author":"Theme Author","description":"A full theme.","version":"1.0.0"}}
